Title: Cambridge Face Memory Test
Instructions_1: Memorize the face in the next three images.
Instructions_2: Which face did you just view? There is only one correct answer. Press 1,2 or 3
Instructions_3: In this test, you will learn to recognize six people.
Instructions_4: Which face did you just view?
Instructions_5: Next you will review the same 6 people for 20 seconds.
Instructions_6: Now your memory of these faces will be tested.
Instructions_7: In the remaining trials, the correct answer can be any of the six faces.
Instructions_8: The incorrect faces are sometimes very similar to the target faces, so be sure to look at each face prior answering.
Instructions_9: To begin memorizing the first face, press the "space bar".
